tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_database_file_exists
tests.trace:
@pytest.fixture(scope="session", autouse=True)
    def _prepare_environment():
        """Run uv sync + db migrate exactly once before the backend is started."""
        assert os.path.isdir(PROJECT_DIR), (
            f"Expected project directory {PROJECT_DIR} to exist."
        )
    
        _kill_stale_servers()
    
        # Remove any old backend log to make assertions deterministic.
        if os.path.exists(LOG_PATH):
            os.remove(LOG_PATH)
    
        sync = subprocess.run(
            ["uv", "sync"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=600,
        )
        assert sync.returncode == 0, (
            f"`uv sync` failed in {PROJECT_DIR}: "
            f"stdout={sync.stdout!r} stderr={sync.stderr!r}"
        )
    
        migrate = subprocess.run(
            ["uv", "run", "reflex", "db", "migrate"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=300,
        )
>       assert migrate.returncode == 0, (
            f"`reflex db migrate` failed: "
            f"stdout={migrate.stdout!r} stderr={migrate.stderr!r}"
        )
E       AssertionError: `reflex db migrate` failed: stdout='' stderr='Traceback (most recent call last):\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/bin/reflex", line 10, in <module>\n    sys.exit(cli())\n             ^^^^^\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1524, in __call__\n    return self.main(*args, **kwargs)\n           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1445, in main\n    rv = self.invoke(ctx)\n         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1912, in invoke\n    return _process_result(sub_ctx.command.invoke(sub_ctx))\n                           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1912, in invoke\n    return _process_result(sub_ctx.command.invoke(sub_ctx))\n                           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1308, in invoke\n    return ctx.invoke(self.callback, **ctx.params)\n           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/click/core.py", line 877, in invoke\n    return callback(*args, **kwargs)\n           ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/reflex/reflex.py", line 684, in migrate\n    prerequisites.get_app()\n  File "/home/user/myproject/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/reflex/utils/prerequisites.py", line 198, in get_app\n    __import__(module, fromlist=(constants.CompileVars.APP,))\n  File "/home/user/myproject/myproject/myproject.py", line 7, in <module>\n    import sqlmodel\nModuleNotFoundError: No module named \'sqlmodel\'\n'
E       assert 1 == 0
E        +  where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['uv', 'run', 'reflex', 'db', 'migrate'], returncode=1, stdout='', stderr='Traceback (most recen...yproject/myproject.py", line 7, in <module>\n    import sqlmodel\nModuleNotFoundError: No module named \'sqlmodel\'\n').returncode
